title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALANGKAYAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4231 / 57 OG No. 13, 2290 (March 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2893, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALANGKAYAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Guinpoliran, Calubian, Bangon, Caisawan and Julag in the Municipality of Balangkayan, Province of Samar, are converted into barrios of said municipality, to be known as the barrios of Guinpoliran, Calubian, Bangon, Caisawan and Julag, respectively.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
